original_image_tags: Typewritten memo on official United States Government stationery. Contains handwritten signatures and notes in pencil and blue ink, as well as various stamps.

elements.description: A typed Office Memorandum from the United States Government, dated 7-29-47, regarding 'METAL FRAGMENTS OBSERVED AT WEST RINDGE, NEW HAMPSHIRE, JULY 7, 1947 SECURITY MATTER (X)'. The page contains no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains only typed text with no visual content (photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, charts, or illustrations).
